products.notes: source=industry_report; url=https://www.enerdata.net/publications/daily-energy-news/lyondellbasell-will-shut-down-its-268-kbd-houston-oil-refinery-early-2025-us.html; Pre-shutdown average: 140 kbd gasoline + 100 kbd diesel + jet + lube oils from 263 kbd nameplate. Implied 53% gasoline / 38% diesel (industry-cited average). Adjusted to 50/32 to leave room for jet, fuel oil, coke (heavy-sour coker), LPG, refinery gas. Note: refinery shut down Q1 2025; pre-shutdown slate retained for historical scenarios.

refineries.name: KINDER MORGAN CRUDE & CONDENSATE — GALENA PARK

products.notes: source=company_disclosure; url=https://www.cenovus.com/Our-operations/Upgrading-and-refining; Cenovus disclosure: Lima produces 3.8 Mgal/d gasoline + 1.3 Mgal/d diesel + 0.6 Mgal/d jet from 172 kbd (~7.2 Mgal/d crude). Implied yields: 52% gasoline, 18% diesel, 8% jet. Rounded to add naphtha (petchem feedstock) and balance products. 2019 heavy-conversion project lets plant swing light/heavy.
